C

CalAngleError(int[][], double[]) - Method in class molecular_modeling.BADError
Calculate the error for Angle.
CalBondError(int[][], double[]) - Method in class molecular_modeling.BADError
Calculate the error for Bond.
CalculateGeometry(double[][], double[]) - Method in class molecular_modeling.MolDyn
From here down is the algorithm for calculating geometry of the provided molecular structure.
CalculateGeometry - Variable in class molecular_modeling.molecularModeling
 
CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class molecular_modeling.molecularModeling
event handler for Geometry button: Calls BADExtraction class to extract all the bonds, angles and dihedrals Call MolDyn class to calculate geometry from these parameters Remove existing molecular structure from the scenegraph Calculates new parameters and redraw structure with the help of createGraphics class.
CalDihedralError(int[][], double[][], double[][]) - Method in class molecular_modeling.BADError
Calculate the dihedral error.
cancelCellEditing() - Method in class molecular_modeling.EachRowEditor
 
canvas3D - Static variable in class molecular_modeling.CreateGraphics
 
canvas3d - Variable in class molecular_modeling.mouseEvents
 
CanvasInternalFrame - Variable in class molecular_modeling.molecularModeling
 
canvasmenu - Variable in class molecular_modeling.molecularModeling
 
centerofmassbtn - Variable in class molecular_modeling.molecularModeling
 
centerofmassbtnActionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class molecular_modeling.molecularModeling
Algorithm to calculate the center of mass for molecular structure and sets it as the center of mouse rotation.
cf1 - Variable in class molecular_modeling.DBEntry
 
cf2 - Variable in class molecular_modeling.DBEntry
 
changeVertex(int, float, float, float, String) - Static method in class molecular_modeling.CreateGraphics
Whenever any atom changes its position, this function is to be called to remove atom from its current position and draw it to the new location Managing all the links it has and the information it has in the description.
CleanSceneGraph() - Static method in class molecular_modeling.CreateGraphics
cleans the 3D canvas or scene graph before reading an existing structure from the file reset every needed settings to completely start a new one.
clearall() - Method in class molecular_modeling.DBEntry
After saving, clear all the textboxes for the next entry.
Cmain - Variable in class molecular_modeling.mouseEvents
 
Coord - Variable in class molecular_modeling.BADError
 
Coord - Variable in class molecular_modeling.MolDyn
 
CreateElementsTable() - Method in class molecular_modeling.molecularModeling
Create the main elements table set its properties accordingly.
CreateGraphics - Class in molecular_modeling
 
CreateGraphics() - Constructor for class molecular_modeling.CreateGraphics
 
CreateGraphics(molecularModeling) - Method in class molecular_modeling.CreateGraphics
Calls only once after starting the program to create 3D canvas and initial atom and setting up the 3D environment, also register mouse events by calling MouseEvents class.
createMatAppear(Color3f, Color3f, float) - Static method in class molecular_modeling.CreateGraphics
 
CreateSphere(Primitive) - Method in class molecular_modeling.CreateGraphics
This function used to create atom on the 3D canvas by setting all the required properties, according to the requirements.
createTG(float, float, float) - Method in class molecular_modeling.CreateGraphics
 
createTg(float, float, float) - Static method in class molecular_modeling.CreateGraphics
